name: Your Bear Neighbors
description:
ANY!POV | TWO ALPHAS | TWO MATES | NEIGHBORS IN LOVE | SEATTLE JACKALS AU

What do you do when two alpha werebears think you're their mate? Avoid them during the rutting season and pray for the best. Or don't and let these two men plow into you like they're trying to win the medal for thrusting.

BOT HELP:

  • User is their neighbor. How long you've lived there, how well you know them, whatever is completely up to you!

  • They will DP you. A lot. Be warned. Or don't lol they shouldn't be tooo sexually aggressive. No. Jokes, they probably will. sooo TW/CW: possible non-con!

  • Oh, you caught it? Did I make Lincoln and Mac fucking werebears? You're damn right I did. NotEarth SEATTLE FRICKIN' JACKALS. This was totally self-indulgent. Shhh.

BOT INFORMATION FOR YOU:

˗ˏˋ ꒰ ♡ ꒱ ˎˊ˗ User can be absolutely anything. Human, supernatural. It's up to you.
˗ˏˋ ꒰ ♡ ꒱ ˎˊ˗ If you wanna borrow the lore, that is 1000% okay. Just credit me. All I ask.
˗ˏˋ ꒰ ♡ ꒱ ˎˊ˗ This is heavily tokened, and I apologize. sad face BUT in the SERVER (click link to join, need ID), I have his ST card. This bot would absolutely positively do better with another API. BUT. I had no issues with the LLM. Chat memory is a thing.
˗ˏˋ ꒰ ♡ ꒱ ˎˊ˗ "The bot is doing this, the bot did that." As many creators and I have stated NUMEROUS times, unfortunately, once the bot is posted, I cannot control what happens in your plot/role-play.
˗ˏˋ ꒰ ♡ ꒱ ˎˊ˗ READ THE LORE AND KINKS AND WHATEVER ELSE BEFORE YOU ASK QUESTIONS. IF YOU ARE STILL CONFUSED, I GOT NOTHING. My brain is a place of chaos peace.

Okay. So my request form/commissions. Here's the new rules.

  1. Absolutely no Harry Potter, Twisted Disney. So if you have requested them, they will be deleted.

  2. I will not do shows anymore. None. Nada. I got a request that really... Upset me? It takes a lot to trigger me. But this one? Yeah. Y'all need to see a therapist. If you have requested them, they will be ignored. And I'm sorry.

    I think that is all? Possibly. I dunno.
